a.text: Goodbye! Feel free to return anytime if you need help.

I don't have access to real-time information, so I can't tell you the current time. 

To find out what time it is, you can:
- Check your device (phone, computer, watch, etc.)
- Search "current time" online
- Ask a voice assistant like Siri, Alexa, or Google Assistant

Is there anything else I can help you with?
